title: Violet Pulls Sanji into Dressrosa’s Secrets
description: Pages 5–8 focus on violet pulls sanji into dressrosa’s secrets, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Violet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sanji becomes entangled with Violet while Law’s Green Bit exchange collapses into a trap involving Doflamingo and Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: [17:17] <shirish> I am sure, I am not sure how many people have been in the past 7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7.7

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Back- tracking in time a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 30 minutes before Caesar's exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What in the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Everything is laid bare before me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: From the moment we met, I've seen right through you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've heard that your weakness is women, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: to this extent? ... pathetic ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Your collar is crumpled, your necktle bent... and your shirt covered in blood

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're a real mess

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Someone else, I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a shame of man you are... "Black Leg Sanji"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Did you really think that you had won my heart?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fufu... Don't make me laugh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: gyahaha this worth- less pest

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Was drawn right in by big SIS' charm!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...HA... you're lying

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Violet- Chan... HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 01, keep dreaming! That was all an act, before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You really have a beautiful heart...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I love but you were tempted by these bad men into a position you really don't want to be in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even after all this, you're still saying that?
